caption: In the video, a man with a beard and short hair is seated in front of a backdrop featuring a lush jungle scene with mountains and waterfalls, along with the title "Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle." He is wearing a plaid shirt with red, blue, and green patterns. Initially, there is a purple graphic with the text "JAC" on the screen. As the video progresses, the graphic disappears, and the man appears to be speaking or reacting to something off-camera, as he looks up and to the side with an expression of surprise or interest. The setting suggests that this could be an interview or promotional event for the movie.
